log.context: Committed and pushed `e1b731e` to `bigclungus/clungcord` on `main`. Two files changed (`packages/server/src/index.ts` and `packages/server/src/ws.ts`) — 43 insertions, 28 deletions. The fix moves WebSocket authentication from a client-sent message (which couldn't read HttpOnly cookies) to the HTTP upgrade request where cookies are available.
